expected_main_lane_changes: Add three local UPM package references to Packages/manifest.json.
Add quarantine showcase placements to Assets/_Project/Editor/V0SceneBuilder.cs after import validation passes.
Add per-level required showcase names to Assets/_Project/Editor/V0LevelValidator.cs.
Rebuild generated scenes through Unity only after validator import gate is green.
top_actionable_recommendations: Import in two compile batches: manifest plus import validator first, showcase and scene rebuild second.
Use the representative inventory rather than every generated asset to keep validation fast while covering prefabs, materials, meshes, and the WVM03 runtime script.
Block scene work until WVM03 compiles because it is the only target package with a runtime assembly.
Keep SCK2 modules presentation-only until collision, occlusion, nav, and door authority are owned by the primary level lane.
Keep EE02 visual enemy poses detached from AI, damage, nav, hit proxies, animation, and spawner authority.
Keep WVM03 weapon visuals presentation-only until first-person hand scale, muzzle alignment, recoil clearance, reload clearance, and sockets pass.
Add manifest-count and prefab-safety validator helpers after basic loadability passes.
Require at least one new showcase object from each target package family in V0LevelValidator.
Preserve rollback as package-reference removal plus validator/showcase cleanup, not package-root deletion.
Run Unity lookdev only; do not use Blender for this intake.
